name: Sun Loan Company
description_short: Sun Loan Company offers personal installment loans ($150-$3,999) and tax preparation services at physical branches across multiple states, with same-day funding available.
description_long:
Sun Loan Company has operated for over 30 years as a personal loan lender with a focus on serving customers in underserved credit situations. The company operates physical branch locations across Alabama, Illinois, Missouri, New Mexico, Oklahoma, Tennessee, Texas, and Nevada, with a documented Las Vegas branch at 1600 N. Nellis Boulevard. Beyond personal loans, Sun Loan has expanded into tax preparation services, positioning itself as a community financial resource for multiple customer needs.

The company's primary offering is installment personal loans ranging from $150 to $3,999.15 (at the Nevada location), with stated same-day funding capability. Loan purposes include debt consolidation, home improvements, medical expenses, emergency expenses, and major purchases. Sun Loan emphasizes that it evaluates applicants beyond credit scores alone and provides online application options alongside in-person services. The company also offers tax preparation with refund advance options up to $7,000 and advertises that early filers may qualify for faster refunds.

Sun Loan differentiates itself through rapid approval timelines (claiming same-day funding), a stated willingness to look beyond credit scores during underwriting, bilingual services in Spanish, and convenient branch locations. Customer testimonials highlight fast service, personalized staff interactions, and straightforward application processes. The company offers multiple service channels: online applications, in-person visits, and phone applications, with online payment options available.

As a personal loan lender with maximum loan amounts under $4,000 at the reviewed location, Sun Loan serves customers needing smaller installment loans rather than larger personal loans. The lack of published APR rates, terms, or fee structures on the website is a significant information gap. Customers should directly contact the company to understand the true cost of borrowing before applying, as is standard practice with personal loan lenders.
address: 1200 S Air Depot Blvd Ste V, Midwest City, OK 73110

company_info.headquarters: 1200 S Air Depot Blvd Ste V, Midwest City, OK 73110

pros: Same-day funding available upon approval and application completion
Evaluates applicants on factors beyond credit score alone
Established 30+ year operating history as a lender
Online application available without affecting credit score
Multiple service channels: online, phone, and in-person applications
Extended branch hours including Saturday service at select locations
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee information disclosed on website
Maximum loan amounts at reviewed location ($3,999.15) are quite limited
Limited geographic footprint compared to national online lenders
No information provided about required credit score or income thresholds
Tax preparation claims (refund advances up to $7,000) are separate from loan products and have unclear qualification criteria
best_for: Borrowers in Nevada, Texas, Oklahoma, Tennessee, Missouri, Illinois, or Alabama needing loans under $4,000
Customers who prefer in-person service and relationship-based lending over fully automated online lenders
Individuals with fair or limited credit seeking alternative underwriting approaches
Customers seeking combined financial services including tax preparation at one location
diagnosis: Sun Loan is best suited for customers in its service states who need small personal loans under $4,000 and prefer face-to-face interaction with loan officers. The main caveat is the complete absence of published pricing information—borrowers must contact the company directly to learn APR, fees, and terms before committing to an application.
services: In-person loan applications at branch locations
Tax filing via online upload, in-person, or drop-off
